title: Fragmented Reactions Hinder Global Fight Against Omicron Variant
content: Almost two years into the pandemic, finger-pointing, lack of coordination, sparse information and fear are once again influencing policy.
en_title: Fragmented Reactions Hinder Global Fight Against Omicron Variant
en_content: Almost two years into the pandemic, finger-pointing, lack of coordination, sparse information and fear are once again influencing policy.

title: Dozens of Former Afghan Security Forces Dead or Missing Under Taliban, Report Says
content: More than 100 former members of the military and police have been killed or forcibly disappeared by the Taliban since the group came into power, according to an investigation by Human Rights Watch.

des_facet: Human Rights and Human Rights Violations

en_title: Dozens of Former Afghan Security Forces Dead or Missing Under Taliban, Report Says
en_content: More than 100 former members of the military and police have been killed or forcibly disappeared by the Taliban since the group came into power, according to an investigation by Human Rights Watch.

title: Barbados, Formally Casting Off the Queen, Becomes a Republic
content: The island nation swore in its first president, ending nearly 400 years of British rule. Prince Charles and Rihanna were on hand to witness the ceremony.

per_facet: Elizabeth II, Queen of Great Britain

en_title: Barbados, Formally Casting Off the Queen, Becomes a Republic
en_content: The island nation swore in its first president, ending nearly 400 years of British rule. Prince Charles and Rihanna were on hand to witness the ceremony.

title: ‘Like Fresh Meat’: Detailing Rampant Sex Harassment in Australia’s Parliament
content: A sweeping report lays out a cloistered, alcohol-fueled environment where powerful men violated boundaries unchecked.

title: China’s Silence on Peng Shuai Shows the Limits of Beijing’s Propaganda
content: Officials have struggled to respond to a sexual assault allegation that hits at the heights of its buttoned-up political system.

title: Iran Insists on Immediate Lifting of Sanctions as Nuclear Talks Resume
content: After five months, negotiations on restoring the 2015 nuclear deal with Iran resumed in Vienna, but with a harder line from the new Iranian government.

title: Sweden Elects Its First Female Leader — for Second Time in a Week
content: The Swedish Parliament elected Magdalena Andersson as prime minister by a narrow margin. She was first elected last week, but her government soon collapsed over a budget dispute.

more_info.byline: By Cora Engelbrecht and Christina Anderson

en_title: Sweden Elects Its First Female Leader — for Second Time in a Week
en_content: The Swedish Parliament elected Magdalena Andersson as prime minister by a narrow margin. She was first elected last week, but her government soon collapsed over a budget dispute.

title: Hunt for the ‘Blood Diamond of Batteries’ Impedes Green Energy Push
content: Dangerous mining conditions plague Congo, home to the world’s largest supply of cobalt, a key ingredient in electric cars. A leadership battle threatens reforms.

en_title: Hunt for the ‘Blood Diamond of Batteries’ Impedes Green Energy Push

title: Éric Zemmour, Far-Right Pundit, Makes French Presidential Run Official
content: An anti-immigrant writer and right-wing television star, Mr. Zemmour said he was running in the country’s presidential elections next year, ending months of speculation.

title: A panel of F.D.A. advisers is set to discuss Merck’s Covid pill.
content: If an expert committee votes to recommend it, the drug, molnupiravir, could be authorized within days for patients at high risk of severe illness.

title: Counterfeit Covid Masks Are Still Sold Everywhere, Despite Misleading Claims
content: Rising Covid cases have spurred a return to mask-wearing in the U.S. and overseas, at a time when flawed KN95s from China continue to dominate e-commerce sites.

title: In Latest Assault on Dissent, Egypt Convicts a Human Rights Activist
content: Hossam Bahgat avoided a prison term, receiving a relatively modest fine, in a verdict that appeared designed to intimidate dissidents without risking international opprobrium.

title: With Scant Information on Omicron, Biden Turned to Travel Ban to Buy Time
content: “Here’s what it does: It gives us time,” President Biden said of the flight restrictions. He called the new variant a cause for concern, not panic.

title: Biden Military Review Leaves Troops Where They Are, for Now

title: Catherine the Great Letter Up for Auction Shows Her Support for Inoculations

title: Flood-Drenched British Columbians Fear This Is the New Normal
content: Washed-out roads and destroyed bridges are just some of the devastation afflicting residents of the western province and could signal what climate change will bring in the future.

content: Officials said that while they need more data to be sure, existing treatments and precautions seem to be effective against the Omicron variant.

title: Honduras Election Front-Runner Vows New Era but Is Tied to Past

title: The U.K. announces Omicron cases and extends boosters to all adults.

title: Dutch police arrest a couple who fled quarantine and boarded a plane.
content: One of the pair tested positive for the coronavirus after they arrived on a flight from South Africa. They were quarantined at a hotel.

title: Czech president appoints a new prime minister — from inside a transparent cube.

title: Portugal detects 13 cases of Omicron tied to a soccer team.
content: The team, Belenenses, took part in a game that had to be abandoned after a Covid outbreak reduced the number of eligible players. One infected player had recently returned from South Africa.
en_title: Portugal detects 13 cases of Omicron tied to a soccer team.
en_content: The team, Belenenses, took part in a game that had to be abandoned after a Covid outbreak reduced the number of eligible players. One infected player had recently returned from South Africa.
